content: If we integrate the ACP harness agent runtime execution model as a standardized orchestration layer for desktop and cloud computer automation agents, we can enable heterogeneous general computer-using agents (like Ace and Microsoft Copilot Studio agents) to seamlessly hand off cross-environment tasks between local desktops and cloud desktops provisioned by Cua. This creates a unified hybrid execution fabric that breaks down the current silos between local desktop automation and cloud-hosted agent work.
source_topics: ACP harness agent runtime execution model
